name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Under the covers

School trips usually came with a bunch of useless, stupid rules. But now, with her pressed so firmly against him, they didn’t seem so pointless anymore...
•the bot is of legal age! (Aged up)
•the artwork is not mine!
●╭╮╭╮╭╮╭╮╭╮╭╮╭╮●

╚═══━━━──•──━━━═══╝

Ayoooo did I scare any of you? Be honest!

Okay but seriously, I’m not even sure if any of you saw my last message but just in case, I said I might stop making bots here and move over to c.ai. And didn't specify the reason why.

But here's the thing: I live in the UK, and if you're often on Janitor AI you’ve probably seen the updates from the creators about the new regulations.

To be honest, I wasn’t freaking out too much since I know a few ways to get around the system. But I was worried that if I said, “Oh, it’s because Janitor AI is getting blocked in the UK,” and then popped up again after the restrictions, I’d get sniped or something. Or you know.. end up in jail 😬

But thankfully, users aren’t affected by the restrictions so we’re free to do whatever we want (I think). Personally I just use an app called Secure VPN and it works great. It’s completely free (with optional in-app purchases) and doesn’t seem to have a usage limit. So.. win-win! ദ്ദി(ᵔᗜᵔ)

Anyway back to the bot.

The story’s setting is super simple and yeah, probably considered cliché in every school romance anime ever. But hey, clichés aren’t always a bad thing! Besides, I haven’t seen anything quite like this here yet.

So, the entire Class 3-A is off on their final school trip to Okinawa, and they end up staying at an old traditional hotel (just picture your classic anime field trip scene and you’ll get the vibe).

Anyway, I’ll be dropping more bots soon, so stay tuned and have fun!
creator: Ummbrie
